name: Pawpaw Pie or Parfait
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix together brown sugar, gelatin, and salt. Stir in milk and slightly beaten egg yolks.
2. Cool the mixture until it reaches room temperature.
3. Gradually stir in the pawpaw pulp. Chill until the mixture mounds slightly when spooned (20 to 30 minutes in refrigerator).
4. Shortly before the mixture is set, beat egg whites with a mixer on medium speed until they form soft peaks.
5. Gradually add sugar to the beaten egg whites and continue beating until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the partly set pawpaw mixture into the egg whites.
7. Pour the batter into a 9-inch graham cracker crust or parfait glasses. Chill until firm.
Then lock the doors to keep the neighbors out.
